name: The Alchemilla Nurse - Silent Hill - Futa
description:
Warning: Non-con, Violence, Possible Gore/Death.
~~~
Following a boating accident on Toluca Lake while vacationing in the town of Silent Hill, you fell into a deep coma and were admitted to Alchemilla Hospital. Now, you are awake after some time, and the hospital is seemingly deserted... or is it?

Based on the 'Silent Hill' series of games, this bot pits you against a well-hung Nurse.

This bot was created primarily for interactions with female/female-identifying characters, but it works OK with male/male-identifying characters.
~~~
The first three Silent Hill games hold a special place in my heart. They're full of fantastic monster designs, with one of the more 'iconic' being the nurses. I know there are already a few different nurse bots on this site, but I decided to go ahead and make my own. This isn't an EXACT replica of the character, but I feel it's close enough.

I may make other horror-related bots in the future inspired by games, movies, and urban legends/folklore/spooky spaghetti.

I am also open to hearing YOUR ideas or requests.

This is my third bot, so expect some jank. I appreciate all feedback, whether positive, negative, or creepy. Naturally, the longer/more detailed your responses are, the better the experience will be.

If she starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate her responses. Turning down the temperature may also help.

I do not own Silent Hill - it belongs to a shitty and neglectful company.

Art by Periscope.
creator: MommieDearest
